content.content: 1→# Maimai Assistant - Project Memory 2→ 3→## Architecture 4→- **Three search paths**: search_center (Path A), enterprise (Path B), talent_bank (Path C, added Mar 2026) 5→- Enterprise path opens a new tab via "招聘" button, uses inline chat (no separate chat page) 6→- Talent bank path: same page navigation via "招人" → "搜索" tab, inline "立即沟通" + "发送后继续沟通" 7→- Talent bank IM: sends open a new IM tab with chat iframe (`/chat?fr=ent&in_iframe=1&...`); exchange buttons inside iframe `div.tool.normal` 8→- BrowserManager has multi-tab support: `wait_for_new_tab()`, `switch_to_primary_tab()`, `close_current_tab()`, `len(browser.context.pages)` 9→- BrowserManager does NOT have `tab_count` property — use `len(browser.context.pages)` instead 10→- `SearchMode` enum in `src/services/pipeline.py`: `SEARCH_CENTER` | `ENTERPRISE` | `TALENT_BANK` 11→- Checkpoint saves/restores `mode` field for resume support 12→ 13→## Key Patterns 14→- `_extract_search_results` 的 JS 提取逻辑易受脉脉页面结构变化影响：name 正则需覆盖括号注释，`isSkippable()` 需随页面新增社交标签/活动标签更新 15→- `browser.page` returns the active tab; all existing modules work unchanged 16→- Enterprise search: opens new tab, extracts candidates, optionally keeps tab open for inline messaging 17→- `keep_tab_open=True` parameter on `search_candidates_enterprise()` keeps enterprise tab for `send_message_batch_enterprise()` 18→- Enterprise tab is closed between keyword searches to avoid tab accumulation (except the last keyword when messaging follows) 19→- Always `switch_to_primary_tab()` before navigating to homepage to avoid destructively changing user's original tab 20→ 21→## Config 22→- `config/selectors.json` v1.4.0: has `talent_bank`, `enterprise`, `profile`, `message` sections 23→- Talent bank selectors: `text='招人'`, `text='搜索'`, `input.ant-input`, `text='立即沟通'`, `text='发送后继续沟通'`, iframe chat exchange buttons 24→- Enterprise selectors: `text='招聘'`, `text='添加关键词'`, `text='立即沟通'`, `text='发送后留在此页'`, etc. 25→- Talent bank IM iframe: recorder can't capture events (JS inject works but clicks lost); use CDP direct inspection instead 26→- **IM iframe 交换按钮**: Playwright 复合选择器(`:has(:text-is())`)在 iframe 中静默失败，必须用 `frame.evaluate()` + JS `el.click()` 直接点击 27→- **交换按钮实际文本**: "交换手机"(非"交换电话"/"交换手机号")、"交换微信"；点击后变为"申请中"/"交换中" 28→- **交换微信有确认弹窗**: 点击"交换微信"后出现 `确定` 需二次确认，交换手机无需确认 29→- **Emunium CDP 兼容**: `viewport_size` 在 CDP 模式为 None，导致 Emunium `click_at()`/`type_at()` 抛 TypeError。`human_click`/`human_type` 已加 fallback 30→- **"立即沟通"按钮定位**: `text='立即沟通'` 匹配页面上第一个按钮而非当前候选人的。需从候选人名字元素向上遍历 DOM 找到所属卡片，再在卡片内定位按钮 31→- **textarea 填充**: 平台"立即沟通"弹窗会预填候选人名字。用 JS native setter (`HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype.value.set`) 强制覆盖，避免 React 受控组件合并文本 32→- **人才银行公司过滤**: 是客户端过滤（搜到后按 company 字段筛选），非页面 UI 筛选，候选人池小时需多搜几页 33→ 34→## CLI 35→- `--mode/-m search_center|enterprise|talent_bank` on `search` and `pipeline` commands (default: search_center) 36→- `--exchange-phone` / `--exchange-wechat` flags on `pipeline` (talent_bank mode only) 37→- `--min-years` filter on `pipeline` and `search` (talent_bank mode only, clicks 页面"工作年限"下拉) 38→- `--batch-pages` with enterprise/talent_bank mode warns user about infinite-scroll incompatibility 39→- Resume flow reads mode from checkpoint params 40→ 41→## User Preferences 42→- `/ship` 推送 main 分支时不需要确认，直接推 43→ 44→## Custom Skills & Automation (2026-03-02) 45→- **Global skills (9)**: `/ship`, `/review`, `/debug`, `/preflight`, `/lessons`, `/test`, `/bootstrap`, `/record`, `/peon-ping-toggle` 46→- **Pre-commit hook**: `~/.claude/hooks/pre-commit-test.sh` symlinked to maimai/boss/relay/peon-ping/stone-web 47→- **Makefile**: `make test/lint/format/typecheck/ci/dev/search/pipeline/record/backup/chrome/clean` 48→- macOS 环境 Makefile 用 `python3`/`pip3`（无 `python` 命令） 49→- **Skill 联动**: `/preflight` → `/test` or pipeline → `/debug` (if fails) → `/lessons` → `/ship` 50→ 51→## 待修复遗留项（下次 review 时提醒用户） 52→ 53→### 已完成 54→1. ~~**批量发送重复代码**~~ ✅（2026-03-03, commit 77d1752） 55→ - 提取 `_send_message_batch_common()` + 3 个回调工厂，消除 ~60% 重复代码 56→ - pipeline.py `send_batch()` 合并为统一 mode dispatch 57→2. ~~**checkpoint 参数缺失**~~ ✅（2026-03-03, commit 1432755） 58→ - `CheckpointManager.save()` 补齐 `exchange_phone`/`exchange_wechat`/`min_years` 59→ 60→### 待处理（4 项架构级） 61→1. **循环依赖 message↔selector_discovery**（Review #1-8 遗留） 62→ - `message.py` 和 `selector_discovery.py` 互相 deferred import 63→ - 运行时正常但影响静态分析和可维护性，需提取公共模块解耦 64→ 65→2. **测试覆盖率低**（Review #2-8 遗留） 66→ - 仅 test_config + test_validators（13 个测试） 67→ - scoring/delays/rate_limiter/checkpoint 等纯逻辑模块需补单元测试 68→ - Web 层（routers/task_queue/progress）零测试，需集成测试 69→ 70→3. **emit_progress 可靠性**（Review #3-8 遗留） 71→ - fire-and-forget 无送达保证，长期应考虑 ACK 或缓冲机制 72→ 73→4. **queue.current_task 竞态**（Review #3-8 遗留） 74→ - pipeline confirm 端点通过 `queue.current_task` 访问任务，无同步保护 75→ - 应改为通过 task_id 直接查找（`queue.get_task(task_id)`）而非依赖 current_task 76→ 77→5. **min_years 跨关键词过滤待验证**（Review #8 新增） 78→ - 只在第一个关键词设置 UI 过滤，需验证切关键词后筛选状态是否保持 79→

file.content: # Maimai Assistant - Project Memory ## Architecture - **Three search paths**: search_center (Path A), enterprise (Path B), talent_bank (Path C, added Mar 2026) - Enterprise path opens a new tab via "招聘" button, uses inline chat (no separate chat page) - Talent bank path: same page navigation via "招人" → "搜索" tab, inline "立即沟通" + "发送后继续沟通" - Talent bank IM: sends open a new IM tab with chat iframe (`/chat?fr=ent&in_iframe=1&...`); exchange buttons inside iframe `div.tool.normal` - BrowserManager has multi-tab support: `wait_for_new_tab()`, `switch_to_primary_tab()`, `close_current_tab()`, `len(browser.context.pages)` - BrowserManager does NOT have `tab_count` property — use `len(browser.context.pages)` instead - `SearchMode` enum in `src/services/pipeline.py`: `SEARCH_CENTER` | `ENTERPRISE` | `TALENT_BANK` - Checkpoint saves/restores `mode` field for resume support ## Key Patterns - `_extract_search_results` 的 JS 提取逻辑易受脉脉页面结构变化影响：name 正则需覆盖括号注释，`isSkippable()` 需随页面新增社交标签/活动标签更新 - `browser.page` returns the active tab; all existing modules work unchanged - Enterprise search: opens new tab, extracts candidates, optionally keeps tab open for inline messaging - `keep_tab_open=True` parameter on `search_candidates_enterprise()` keeps enterprise tab for `send_message_batch_enterprise()` - Enterprise tab is closed between keyword searches to avoid tab accumulation (except the last keyword when messaging follows) - Always `switch_to_primary_tab()` before navigating to homepage to avoid destructively changing user's original tab ## Config - `config/selectors.json` v1.4.0: has `talent_bank`, `enterprise`, `profile`, `message` sections - Talent bank selectors: `text='招人'`, `text='搜索'`, `input.ant-input`, `text='立即沟通'`, `text='发送后继续沟通'`, iframe chat exchange buttons - Enterprise selectors: `text='招聘'`, `text='添加关键词'`, `text='立即沟通'`, `text='发送后留在此页'`, etc. - Talent bank IM iframe: recorder can't capture events (JS inject works but clicks lost); use CDP direct inspection instead - **IM iframe 交换按钮**: Playwright 复合选择器(`:has(:text-is())`)在 iframe 中静默失败，必须用 `frame.evaluate()` + JS `el.click()` 直接点击 - **交换按钮实际文本**: "交换手机"(非"交换电话"/"交换手机号")、"交换微信"；点击后变为"申请中"/"交换中" - **交换微信有确认弹窗**: 点击"交换微信"后出现 `确定` 需二次确认，交换手机无需确认 - **Emunium CDP 兼容**: `viewport_size` 在 CDP 模式为 None，导致 Emunium `click_at()`/`type_at()` 抛 TypeError。`human_click`/`human_type` 已加 fallback - **"立即沟通"按钮定位**: `text='立即沟通'` 匹配页面上第一个按钮而非当前候选人的。需从候选人名字元素向上遍历 DOM 找到所属卡片，再在卡片内定位按钮 - **textarea 填充**: 平台"立即沟通"弹窗会预填候选人名字。用 JS native setter (`HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype.value.set`) 强制覆盖，避免 React 受控组件合并文本 - **人才银行公司过滤**: 是客户端过滤（搜到后按 company 字段筛选），非页面 UI 筛选，候选人池小时需多搜几页 ## CLI - `--mode/-m search_center|enterprise|talent_bank` on `search` and `pipeline` commands (default: search_center) - `--exchange-phone` / `--exchange-wechat` flags on `pipeline` (talent_bank mode only) - `--min-years` filter on `pipeline` and `search` (talent_bank mode only, clicks 页面"工作年限"下拉) - `--batch-pages` with enterprise/talent_bank mode warns user about infinite-scroll incompatibility - Resume flow reads mode from checkpoint params ## User Preferences - `/ship` 推送 main 分支时不需要确认，直接推 ## Custom Skills & Automation (2026-03-02) - **Global skills (9)**: `/ship`, `/review`, `/debug`, `/preflight`, `/lessons`, `/test`, `/bootstrap`, `/record`, `/peon-ping-toggle` - **Pre-commit hook**: `~/.claude/hooks/pre-commit-test.sh` symlinked to maimai/boss/relay/peon-ping/stone-web - **Makefile**: `make test/lint/format/typecheck/ci/dev/search/pipeline/record/backup/chrome/clean` - macOS 环境 Makefile 用 `python3`/`pip3`（无 `python` 命令） - **Skill 联动**: `/preflight` → `/test` or pipeline → `/debug` (if fails) → `/lessons` → `/ship` ## 待修复遗留项（下次 review 时提醒用户） ### 已完成 1. ~~**批量发送重复代码**~~ ✅（2026-03-03, commit 77d1752） - 提取 `_send_message_batch_common()` + 3 个回调工厂，消除 ~60% 重复代码 - pipeline.py `send_batch()` 合并为统一 mode dispatch 2. ~~**checkpoint 参数缺失**~~ ✅（2026-03-03, commit 1432755） - `CheckpointManager.save()` 补齐 `exchange_phone`/`exchange_wechat`/`min_years` ### 待处理（4 项架构级） 1. **循环依赖 message↔selector_discovery**（Review #1-8 遗留） - `message.py` 和 `selector_discovery.py` 互相 deferred import - 运行时正常但影响静态分析和可维护性，需提取公共模块解耦 2. **测试覆盖率低**（Review #2-8 遗留） - 仅 test_config + test_validators（13 个测试） - scoring/delays/rate_limiter/checkpoint 等纯逻辑模块需补单元测试 - Web 层（routers/task_queue/progress）零测试，需集成测试 3. **emit_progress 可靠性**（Review #3-8 遗留） - fire-and-forget 无送达保证，长期应考虑 ACK 或缓冲机制 4. **queue.current_task 竞态**（Review #3-8 遗留） - pipeline confirm 端点通过 `queue.current_task` 访问任务，无同步保护 - 应改为通过 task_id 直接查找（`queue.get_task(task_id)`）而非依赖 current_task 5. **min_years 跨关键词过滤待验证**（Review #8 新增） - 只在第一个关键词设置 UI 过滤，需验证切关键词后筛选状态是否保持

Talent bank path: same page navigation via "招人" → "搜索" tab, inline "立即沟通" + "发送后继续沟通" - Talent bank IM: sends open a new IM tab with chat iframe (`/chat?fr=ent&in_iframe=1&...`); exchange buttons inside iframe `div.tool.normal` - BrowserManager has multi-tab support: `wait_for_new_tab()`, `switch_to_primary_tab()`, `close_current_tab()`, `len(browser.context.pages)` - BrowserManager does NOT have `tab_count` property — use `len(browser.context.pages)` instead - `SearchMode` enum in `src/services/pipeline.py`: `SEARCH_CENTER` | `ENTERPRISE` | `TALENT_BANK` - Checkpoint saves/restores `mode` field for resume support ## Key Patterns - `_extract_search_results` 的 JS 提取逻辑易受脉脉页面结构变化影响：name 正则需覆盖括号注释，`isSkippable()` 需随页面新增社交标签/活动标签更新 - `browser.page` returns the active tab; all existing modules work unchanged - Enterprise search: opens new tab, extracts candidates, optionally keeps tab open for inline messaging - `keep_tab_open=True` parameter on `search_candidates_enterprise()` keeps enterprise tab for `send_message_batch_enterprise()` - Enterprise tab is closed between keyword searches to avoid tab accumulation (except the last keyword when messaging follows) - Always `switch_to_primary_tab()` before navigating to homepage to avoid destructively changing user's original tab ## Config - `config/selectors.json` v1.4.0: has `talent_bank`, `enterprise`, `profile`, `message` sections - Talent bank selectors: `text='招人'`, `text='搜索'`, `input.ant-input`, `text='立即沟通'`, `text='发送后继续沟通'`, iframe chat exchange buttons - Enterprise selectors: `text='招聘'`, `text='添加关键词'`, `text='立即沟通'`, `text='发送后留在此页'`, etc. - Talent bank IM iframe: recorder can't capture events (JS inject works but clicks lost); use CDP direct inspection instead - **IM iframe 交换按钮**: Playwright 复合选择器(`:has(:text-is())`)在 iframe 中静默失败，必须用 `frame.evaluate()` + JS `el.click()` 直接点击 - **交换按钮实际文本**: "交换手机"(非"交换电话"/"交换手机号")、"交换微信"；点击后变为"申请中"/"交换中" - **交换微信有确认弹窗**: 点击"交换微信"后出现 `确定` 需二次确认，交换手机无需确认 - **Emunium CDP 兼容**: `viewport_size` 在 CDP 模式为 None，导致 Emunium `click_at()`/`type_at()` 抛 TypeError。`human_click`/`human_type` 已加 fallback - **"立即沟通"按钮定位**: `text='立即沟通'` 匹配页面上第一个按钮而非当前候选人的。需从候选人名字元素向上遍历 DOM 找到所属卡片，再在卡片内定位按钮 - **textarea 填充**: 平台"立即沟通"弹窗会预填候选人名字。用 JS native setter (`HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype.value.set`) 强制覆盖，避免 React 受控组件合并文本 - **人才银行公司过滤**: 是客户端过滤（搜到后按 company 字段筛选），非页面 UI 筛选，候选人池小时需多搜几页 ## CLI - `--mode/-m search_center|enterprise|talent_bank` on `search` and `pipeline` commands (default: search_center) - `--exchange-phone` / `--exchange-wechat` flags on `pipeline` (talent_bank mode only) - `--min-years` filter on `pipeline` and `search` (talent_bank mode only, clicks 页面"工作年限"下拉) - `--batch-pages` with enterprise/talent_bank mode warns user about infinite-scroll incompatibility - Resume flow reads mode from checkpoint params ## User Preferences - `/ship` 推送 main 分支时不需要确认，直接推 ## Custom Skills & Automation (2026-03-02) - **Global skills (9)**: `/ship`, `/review`, `/debug`, `/preflight`, `/lessons`, `/test`, `/bootstrap`, `/record`, `/peon-ping-toggle` - **Pre-commit hook**: `~/.claude/hooks/pre-commit-test.sh` symlinked to maimai/boss/relay/peon-ping/stone-web - **Makefile**: `make test/lint/format/typecheck/ci/cli/search/pipeline/record/backup/chrome/clean` - macOS 环境 Makefile 用 `python3`/`pip3`（无 `python` 命令） - **Skill 联动**: `/preflight` → `/test` or pipeline → `/debug` (if fails) → `/lessons` → `/ship` ## 待修复遗留项（下次 review 时提醒用户） ### 已完成 1. ~~**批量发送重复代码**~~ ✅（2026-03-03, commit 77d1752） - 提取 `_send_message_batch_common()` + 3 个回调工厂，消除 ~60% 重复代码 - pipeline.py `send_batch()` 合并为统一 mode dispatch 2. ~~**checkpoint 参数缺失**~~ ✅（2026-03-03, commit 1432755） - `CheckpointManager.save()` 补齐 `exchange_phone`/`exchange_wechat`/`min_years` ### 待处理（4 项架构级） 1. **循环依赖 message↔selector_discovery**（Review #1-8 遗留） - `message.py` 和 `selector_discovery.py` 互相 deferred import - 运行时正常但影响静态分析和可维护性，需提取公共模块解耦 2. **测试覆盖率低**（Review #2-8 遗留） - 仅 test_config + test_validators（13 个测试） - scoring/delays/rate_limiter/checkpoint 等纯逻辑模块需补单元测试 - Web 层（routers/task_queue/progress）零测试，需集成测试 3. **emit_progress 可靠性**（Review #3-8 遗留） - fire-and-forget 无送达保证，长期应考虑 ACK 或缓冲机制 4. **queue.current_task 竞态**（Review #3-8 遗留） - pipeline confirm 端点通过 `queue.current_task` 访问任务，无同步保护 - 应改为通过 task_id 直接查找（`queue.get_task(task_id)`）而非依赖 current_task 5. **min_years 跨关键词过滤待验证**（Review #8 新增） - 只在第一个关键词设置 UI 过滤，需验证切关键词后筛选状态是否保持

Base directory for this skill: /Users/zhouboli/.claude/skills/review

# Code Review Memory

带记忆的工程审查：分析前回顾历史，修复后自动复盘归档。适用于任意语言和框架的项目。

## 历史记录文件

路径：项目根目录下 `.claude/review-history.md`

如果文件不存在，在 Phase 1 创建初始文件：

```markdown
# Code Review History

工程审查历史记录，由 code-review-memory skill 自动维护。

---
```

## 测试命令自动检测

不硬编码测试命令，按以下优先级自动检测项目的测试方式：

1. 查 `package.json` 中的 `scripts.test` → `npm test` 或 `yarn test` 或 `pnpm test`（看 lockfile 判断包管理器）
2. 查 `pyproject.toml` 或 `pytest.ini` 或 `setup.cfg` 中的 pytest 配置 → `pytest tests/ -v`
3. 查 `Makefile` 中是否有 `test` target → `make test`
4. 查 `Cargo.toml` → `cargo test`
5. 查 `go.mod` → `go test ./...`
6. 查 `build.gradle` 或 `pom.xml` → `./gradlew test` 或 `mvn test`
7. 以上都没有 → 询问用户项目的测试命令

检测结果在 Phase 2 首次使用前告知用户确认。

## 工作流程

### Phase 1: 回顾历史

1. 读取项目根目录下 `.claude/review-history.md`
2. 如果有历史记录，向用户展示摘要：
   - 历史审查次数
   - 上次审查日期和主要发现
   - 反复出现的问题模式（如果有）
   - 上次遗留的待办项（如果有）
3. 如果没有历史记录，告知用户这是首次审查

### Phase 2: 分析与修复

1. 使用 Explore agent 全面扫描工程，关注：
   - 代码缺陷（bug、逻辑错误、异常处理不当）
   - 安全隐患（硬编码凭证、注入风险）
   - 性能问题（N+1 查询、不必要的重复计算）
   - 架构问题（循环依赖、职责不清）
   - 代码风格（不一致的命名、重复代码）
   - 配置问题（硬编码值、缺少校验）
2. **对照历史记录**，标记哪些是新问题、哪些是历史遗留
3. 向用户报告发现，按严重程度排序（严重 > 中等 > 轻微）
4. 用户确认后执行修复
5. 修复完成后运行测试验证（使用自动检测的测试命令）

### Phase 3: 死代码清理

修复完成后，专门做一轮死代码/无用代码扫描，避免补丁累积产生冗余：

1. 扫描以下类型的死代码：
   - 未被调用的函数/方法/类
   - 未使用的 import/require/include
   - 被注释掉的代码块（超过 3 行的注释代码）
   - 已废弃但未删除的变量/常量
   - 空的异常处理块（无实际逻辑）
   - 仅为向后兼容保留但已无调用方的代码（如旧接口别名、重导出）
2. 对照本次 Phase 2 的修复内容，重点检查修复是否引入了新的冗余（如旧实现未删、临时调试代码残留）
3. 向用户报告发现的死代码，说明每项为什么判定为无用
4. 用户确认后执行清理
5. 清理完成后再次运行测试

### Phase 4: 生成复盘记录

修复和清理全部完成后，将以下内容**追加**到 `.claude/review-history.md` 末尾：

```markdown
## Review #{序号} - {YYYY-MM-DD}

### 发现的问题
| 严重程度 | 文件 | 问题描述 | 状态 |
|---------|------|---------|------|
| 严重/中等/轻微 | path/to/file:行号 | 问题简述 | 已修复/待处理 |

### 修复内容
- 简述每个修复的改动和原因

### 死代码清理
| 文件 | 清理内容 | 类型 |
|------|---------|------|
| path/to/file:行号 | 清理简述 | 未调用函数/未使用import/注释代码/废弃变量/空块/旧兼容 |

### 测试结果
- 测试运行结果摘要

### 复盘
- **做得好的**：本次修复中值得保持的做法
- **待改进的**：仍需关注的问题或下次应注意的点
- **遗留项**：未处理的问题及原因

---
```

## 注意事项

- 不要重复修复历史记录中已标记"已修复"的问题，除非它复发了
- 复盘记录用中文编写
- 每条记录都要包含具体文件路径和行号，便于追溯
- 如果用户只想分析不想修复，Phase 2 中跳过修复步骤，Phase 4 中所有问题标记为"待处理"

   245→## Fix #1 - 2026-03-02（搜索结果提取字段混乱）
   246→
   247→### 背景
   248→搜索功能改为交互式搜索 → 人脉 tab 后，`_extract_search_results` 的 JS 提取逻辑将社交标签和活动信息错误混入 name/company/title 字段。
   249→
   250→**实际卡片 text nodes**：`"郭大明(猎头勿扰)" → "4天前活跃" → "字节跳动前端leader" → "同行，26个共同好友" → "+ 好友"`
   251→**期望**：name="郭大明", company="字节跳动", title="前端leader"
   252→**实际**：name="字节跳动前端leader", company="同行，26个共同好友"
   253→
   254→### 根因（3 个 bug）
   255→| 严重程度 | 位置 | 问题描述 | 状态 |
   256→|---------|------|---------|------|
   257→| 严重 | src/modules/search.py:372 | name 正则不允许括号，"郭大明(猎头勿扰)" 无法匹配为姓名 → 后续公司职位文本被错选为 name | 已修复 |
   258→| 严重 | src/modules/search.py:358-362 | `isSkippable()` 未过滤社交标签（"同行，26个共同好友"），被当作 company/title | 已修复 |
   259→| 轻微 | src/modules/search.py:373 | 匹配姓名后未去除括号注释（"(猎头勿扰)"），name 包含非姓名内容 | 已修复 |
   260→
   261→### 修复内容
   262→- **name 正则扩展**（line 374）：`/^[\u4e00-\u9fa5a-zA-Z·\s()（）]+$/` 允许中英文括号
   263→- **括号注释去除**（line 375）：`part.replace(/[（(][^)）]*[）)]/g, '').trim()` 只保留纯姓名
   264→- **社交标签过滤**（line 363）：`isSkippable()` 新增 `/同行|前同事|校友|共同好友/` 检测
   265→
   266→### 复盘
   267→- **根因分析**: 三个 bug 形成级联——name 正则不匹配 → 真实姓名被跳过 → 公司职位文本被选为 name → 社交标签被选为 company
   268→- **经验**: 脉脉页面结构变化频繁，提取逻辑应以"排除法"为主（先过滤已知非目标文本），而非仅依赖"匹配法"（只匹配预期格式）。`isSkippable()` 的关键词列表需随页面更新维护
   269→- **改进方向**: 可考虑增加提取结果的 sanity check（如 name 不应超过 10 字、company 不应包含"共同好友"等关键词），在提取层之后加一层校验

# Code Review History

工程审查历史记录，由 code-review-memory skill 自动维护。

---

## Review #1 - 2026-02-13

### 发现的问题
| 严重程度 | 文件 | 问题描述 | 状态 |
|---------|------|---------|------|
| 严重 | src/modules/message.py:226-244 | `_handle_quick_contact` 对同一 page 并发 7 个 `wait_for_selector`，Playwright 不支持并发操作 | 已修复 |
| 严重 | src/modules/message.py:226-244 | `asyncio.create_task` ���建的任务取消后未 await，可能产生泄漏警告 | 已修复 |
| 严重 | src/utils/captcha.py:43 | `sys.stdin.readline()` 阻塞事件循环，可能导致 CDP 连接超时 | 已修复 |
| 中等 | src/modules/search.py:680-715 | `_save_candidates_to_db` N+1 查询，每候选人 2 次 SELECT | 已修复 |
| 中等 | src/modules/message.py:612-628 | `send_message_batch` 跳过已发消息检查逐条开 DB session | 已修复 |
| 中等 | src/modules/export.py:129-131 | `_get_candidates_data` 导出时每候选人单独查消息记录 | 已修复 |
| 中等 | 多文件 | `datetime.utcnow()`（naive）与 `_utcnow()`（aware）混用 | 已修复 |
| 中等 | src/modules/selector_discovery.py:286 | `apply_discovered_selectors` 验证失败仍返回 True | 已修复 |
| 中等 | src/modules/message.py↔selector_discovery.py | 循环依赖（延迟 import 绕过，运行时正常） | 待处理 |
| 中等 | src/modules/message.py:552+1479 | `send_message_batch` 和 enterprise 版约 100 行重复逻辑 | 待处理 |
| 中等 | src/utils/rate_limiter.py:226 | `min_interval` 全局冷却而非按操作类型 | 已修复 |
| 中等 | src/utils/validators.py:9-32 | `validate_maimai_id` 调用方未捕获返回值 | 已修复 |
| 中等 | src/utils/config.py:15 | config_dir 使用相对路径 | 已修复 |
| 轻微 | src/modules/profile.py:450 | `import re` 在函数内部 | 已修复 |
| 轻微 | src/modules/message.py:1445,271 | `import sys`、`import traceback` 在函数内部 | 已修复 |
| 轻微 | src/utils/delays.py:86 | `import datetime` 在函数内部 | 已修复 |
| 轻微 | src/utils/checkpoint.py:17 | 硬编码路径 `data/.checkpoints` | 已修复 |
| 轻微 | src/services/pipeline.py:233 | 硬编码路径 `data/reports` | 已修复 |
| 轻微 | src/models/database.py:12 | `declarative_base()` 使用已弃用的 `sqlalchemy.ext.declarative` | 已修复 |
| 轻微 | src/modules/search.py:551 | `profile_links = []` 冗余初始化 | 已修复 |

### 修复内容
- **并发改顺序**: `_handle_quick_contact` 的提交按钮探测从 `asyncio.create_task` 并发改为 `for` 循环顺序探测，每个 selector 1.5s 超时
- **异步 stdin**: captcha.py 的 `sys.stdin.readline()` 改为 `await loop.run_in_executor(None, sys.stdin.readline)`
- **N+1 查询优化**: search/message/export 三处改为 `IN (...)` 批量预取后内存查找
- **datetime 统一**: rate_limiter.py、message.py、checkpoint.py 全部统一为 `datetime.now(timezone.utc)`
- **返回值修复**: selector_discovery 验证失败现在正确返回 False
- **validator 返回值**: message.py 和 profile.py 的 `validate_maimai_id` 调用方现在捕获清理后的值
- **per-type 冷却**: rate_limiter 的 min_interval 检查改为按 action_type 查最后操作时间

- **NaT 修复**: export datetime 格式化后用 `.fillna('')` 替换 NaT 为空字符串

## Fix #1 - 2026-03-02（搜索结果提取字段混乱）

### 背景
搜索功能改为交互式搜索 → 人脉 tab 后，`_extract_search_results` 的 JS 提取逻辑将社交标签和活动信息错误混入 name/company/title 字段。

**实际卡片 text nodes**：`"郭大明(猎头勿扰)" → "4天前活跃" → "字节跳动前端leader" → "同行，26个共同好友" → "+ 好友"`
**期望**：name="郭大明", company="字节跳动", title="前端leader"
**实际**：name="字节跳动前端leader", company="同行，26个共同好友"

### 根因（3 个 bug）
| 严重程度 | 位置 | 问题描述 | 状态 |
|---------|------|---------|------|
| 严重 | src/modules/search.py:372 | name 正则不允许括号，"郭大明(猎头勿扰)" 无法匹配为姓名 → 后续公司职位文本被错选为 name | 已修复 |
| 严重 | src/modules/search.py:358-362 | `isSkippable()` 未过滤社交标签（"同行，26个共同好友"），被当作 company/title | 已修复 |
| 轻微 | src/modules/search.py:373 | 匹配姓名后未去除括号注释（"(猎头勿扰)"），name 包含非姓名内容 | 已修复 |

### 修复内容
- **name 正则扩展**（line 374）：`/^[\u4e00-\u9fa5a-zA-Z·\s()（）]+$/` 允许中英文括号
- **括号注释去除**（line 375）：`part.replace(/[（(][^)）]*[）)]/g, '').trim()` 只保留纯姓名
- **社交标签过滤**（line 363）：`isSkippable()` 新增 `/同行|前同事|校友|共同好友/` 检测

### 复盘
- **根因分析**: 三个 bug 形成级联——name 正则不匹配 → 真实姓名被跳过 → 公司职位文本被选为 name → 社交标签被选为 company
- **经验**: 脉脉页面结构变化频繁，提取逻辑应以"排除法"为主（先过滤已知非目标文本），而非仅依赖"匹配法"（只匹配预期格式）。`isSkippable()` 的关键词列表需随页面更新维护
- **改进方向**: 可考虑增加提取结果的 sanity check（如 name 不应超过 10 字、company 不应包含"共同好友"等关键词），在提取层之后加一层校验

- **待改进的**: ~~前端所有 fetch 调用应统一封装为 `safeFetch()` 函数~~ ✅ 已实施；search.py 的交互式搜索依赖 `asyncio.sleep` 固定延迟而非等待 DOM 变化，网络慢时可能不够稳定

### 追加修复：safeFetch 统一封装

- **方案**: 在 `app.js` 新增 `safeFetch(url, options)` 封装，内置 `res.ok` 检查 + FastAPI 错误信息提取
- **改动范围**: 11 个 fetch 调用点（app.js:1, pipeline.js:4, data.html:3, index.html:3）全部替换为 `safeFetch`，移除各处手写的 `res.ok` 检查
- **效果**: 新增 fetch 调用只需用 `safeFetch` 即可自动获得错误处理，从机制上消除遗漏

   307→

   361→    search_mode = SearchMode(mode)
   362→
   363→    # Talent bank defaults to exchanging phone & WeChat
   364→    if search_mode == SearchMode.TALENT_BANK:

   366→        exchange_wechat = True
   367→
   368→    if search_mode in (SearchMode.ENTERPRISE, SearchMode.TALENT_BANK) and batch_pages > 0:
   369→        console.print(f"[yellow]Note: --batch-pages with {search_mode.value} mode uses infinite scroll; "
   370→                      f"each batch opens a fresh search. Deduplication prevents re-messaging.[/yellow]")
   371→

   374→    async def _pipeline():
   375→        from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
   376→        from src.services.pipeline import search_all_keywords, search_all_keywords_enterprise, search_all_keywords_talent_bank
   377→        from src.modules.message import render_template
   378→        from src.utils.config import get_config
   379→        from rich.panel import Panel
   380→
   381→        reset_delay_session()
   382→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   383→        try:
   384→            await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   385→
   386→            # Preview mode: search and show first 3 messages
   387→            if preview:
   388→                console.print("[cyan]Preview 模式: 搜索并预览前 3 条消息[/cyan]\n")
   389→
   390→                if mode == 'enterprise':
   391→                    all_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   392→                        browser, keywords, company, min(max_pages, 1)
   393→                    )
   394→                elif mode == 'talent_bank':
   395→                    all_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_talent_bank(
   396→                        browser, keywords, company, min(max_pages, 1),
   397→                        min_years=min_years,
   398→                    )
   399→                else:
   400→                    all_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords(
   401→                        browser, keywords, company, location, min(max_pages, 1)
   402→                    )
   403→
   404→                if not all_candidates:
   405→                    console.print("[yellow]没有找到候选人[/yellow]")
   406→                    return
   407→
   408→                # Apply auto-filter
   409→                if auto_filter:
   410→                    from src.utils.filters import filter_candidates
   411→                    before_count = len(all_candidates)
   412→                    candidates_dict = [
   413→                        {
   414→                            'maimai_id': c.maimai_id,
   415→                            'name': c.name,
   416→                            'title': c.title,
   417→                            'company': c.company,
   418→                        }
   419→                        for c in all_candidates
   420→                    ]
   421→                    filtered_dict = filter_candidates(candidates_dict, auto_filter=True)
   422→                    filtered_ids = {c['maimai_id'] for c in filtered_dict}
   423→                    all_candidates = [c for c in all_candidates if c.maimai_id in filtered_ids]
   424→
   425→                    if len(all_candidates) < before_count:
   426→                        console.print(f"[dim]自动过滤: {before_count} → {len(all_candidates)} 位候选人[/dim]\n")
   427→
   428→                    if not all_candidates:
   429→                        console.print("[yellow]过滤后没有符合条件的候选人[/yellow]")
   430→                        return
   431→
   432→                # Load template
   433→                config = get_config()
   434→                tmpl = config.get_template(template)
   435→
   436→                # Show first 3 candidates with rendered messages
   437→                preview_count = min(3, len(all_candidates))
   438→                console.print(f"[bold]预览前 {preview_count} 位候选人的消息:[/bold]\n")
   439→
   440→                for i, c in enumerate(all_candidates[:preview_count], 1):
   441→                    msg_vars = {
   442→                        **variables,
   443→                        'name': c.name,
   444→                        'company': c.company,
   445→                        'position': c.title,
   446→                    }
   447→                    try:
   448→                        rendered = render_template(tmpl['content'], msg_vars)
   449→                        console.print(f"[bold cyan]#{i} {c.name}[/bold cyan] - {c.title} @ {c.company}")
   450→                        console.print(Panel(rendered, title=f"消息预览", border_style="green"))
   451→                        console.print()
   452→                    except Exception as e:
   453→                        console.print(f"[red]渲染失败: {e}[/red]\n")
   454→
   455→                console.print(f"[dim]总共找到 {len(all_candidates)} 位候选人[/dim]")
   456→                console.print("[yellow]Preview 完成，使用 --dry-run 搜索所有页面但不发送[/yellow]")
   457→                return
   458→
   459→            if batch_pages > 0:
   460→                await run_pipeline_batched(
   461→                    browser, keywords, company, location,
   462→                    max_pages, batch_pages, template, variables,
   463→                    dry_run, skip_messaged, interactive, ckpt,
   464→                    mode=search_mode,
   465→                    skip_confirmation=yes,
   466→                    exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   467→                    exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   468→                    min_years=min_years,
   469→                )
   470→            else:
   471→                await run_pipeline_default(
   472→                    browser, keywords, company, location,
   473→                    max_pages, template, variables,
   474→                    dry_run, skip_messaged, interactive,
   475→                    mode=search_mode,
   476→                    skip_confirmation=yes,
   477→                    exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   478→                    exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   479→                    min_years=min_years,
   480→                )
   481→        finally:
   482→            await browser.close()
   483→
   484→    run_async(_pipeline())

   715→@cli.command()
   716→def duplicates():
   717→    """
   718→    查找重复的候选人.
   719→
   720→    按姓名+公司分组，显示重复项。
   721→
   722→    Example:
   723→        maimai duplicates
   724→    """
   725→    from src.models.database import Candidate, get_db_manager
   726→    from sqlalchemy import func
   727→    from rich.table import Table
   728→
   729→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   730→
   731→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   732→        # 按 name + company 分组，找出重复项
   733→        duplicates_query = session.query(
   734→            Candidate.name,
   735→            Candidate.company,
   736→            func.count(Candidate.id).label('count')
   737→        ).group_by(Candidate.name, Candidate.company)\
   738→         .having(func.count(Candidate.id) > 1)\
   739→         .all()
   740→
   741→        if not duplicates_query:
   742→            console.print("[green]✓ 没有发现重复的候选人[/green]")
   743→            return
   744→
   745→        console.print(f"\n[yellow]发现 {len(duplicates_query)} 组重复候选人:[/yellow]\n")
   746→
   747→        table = Table()
   748→        table.add_column("姓名", style="cyan")
   749→        table.add_column("公司", style="yellow")
   750→        table.add_column("重复次数", style="red", justify="right")
   751→
   752→        for name, company, count in duplicates_query:
   753→            table.add_row(name, company or '[dim]未知[/dim]', f"×{count}")
   754→
   755→        console.print(table)
   756→        console.print()
   757→        console.print("[dim]提示: 使用数据库工具手动清理重复项[/dim]")
   758→
   759→
   760→def _parse_variables(var: tuple) -> dict:
   761→    """Parse key=value variable pairs from CLI option."""
   762→    variables = {}
   763→    for v in var:
   764→        if '=' in v:
   765→            key, value = v.split('=', 1)
   766→            variables[key.strip()] = value.strip()
   767→        else:
   768→            console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: ignoring malformed variable '{v}' (expected key=value format)[/yellow]")
   769→    return variables
   770→
   771→
   772→def main():
   773→    """Main entry point."""
   774→    try:
   775→        cli()
   776→    except MaimaiAssistantError as e:
   777→        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   778→        sys.exit(1)
   779→    except KeyboardInterrupt:
   780→        console.print("\n[yellow]Operation cancelled by user[/yellow]")
   781→        sys.exit(0)
   782→    except Exception as e:
   783→        console.print(f"[red]Unexpected error: {e}[/red]")
   784→        sys.exit(1)
   785→
   786→
   787→if __name__ == '__main__':
   788→    main()
   789→

    37→def _auto_backup_database() -> None:
    38→    """自动备份数据库（Pipeline 完成后调用）"""
    39→    try:
    40→        import sys
    41→        from pathlib import Path
    42→
    43→        # Import backup function
    44→        sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent))
    45→        from scripts.backup_data import backup_database
    46→
    47→        success, backup_path = backup_database(silent=True)
    48→        if success:
    49→            console.print(f"[dim]数据库已自动备份: {Path(backup_path).name}[/dim]")
    50→    except Exception as e:
    51→        # Backup failure should not crash pipeline
    52→        from loguru import logger
    53→
    54→        logger.warning(f"Auto backup failed: {e}")

    65→def _candidates_to_dicts(candidates: List[CandidateBasic]) -> List[dict]:
    66→    """Convert CandidateBasic objects to dicts for message batch functions."""
    67→    return [
    68→        {
    69→            "maimai_id": c.maimai_id,
    70→            "name": c.name,
    71→            "company": c.company,
    72→            "title": c.title,

    79→async def search_all_keywords(
    80→    browser: BrowserManager,
    81→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
    82→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
    83→    location: Optional[str],
    84→    max_pages: int,
    85→    start_page: int = 1,
    86→) -> Tuple[List[CandidateBasic], Set[str]]:
    87→    """Iterate keywords, deduplicate, return combined results.
    88→
    89→    Args:
    90→        browser: BrowserManager instance
    91→        keywords: Keyword strings to search
    92→        company: Company filter strings
    93→        location: Location filter or None
    94→        max_pages: Pages per keyword
    95→        start_page: First page number
    96→
    97→    Returns:
    98→        (deduplicated candidates list, set of seen IDs)
    99→    """
   100→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   101→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   102→
   103→    for idx, kw in enumerate(keywords):
   104→        console.print(f"\n[bold blue][{idx+1}/{len(keywords)}] Searching: {kw}[/bold blue]")
   105→
   106→        candidates = await search_candidates(
   107→            keywords=kw,
   108→            company=company,
   109→            location=location,
   110→            pages=max_pages,
   111→            start_page=start_page,
   112→            browser=browser,
   113→        )
   114→
   115→        new_count = 0
   116→        for c in candidates:
   117→            if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids:
   118→                seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
   119→                all_candidates.append(c)
   120→                new_count += 1
   121→
   122→        console.print(f"  Found {len(candidates)} candidates, {new_count} new (deduplicated)")
   123→
   124→    return all_candidates, seen_ids
   125→
   126→
   127→async def search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   128→    browser: BrowserManager,
   129→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   130→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   131→    max_pages: int,
   132→    keep_last_tab_open: bool = False,
   133→) -> Tuple[List[CandidateBasic], Set[str]]:
   134→    """Iterate keywords via enterprise path, deduplicate, return combined results.
   135→
   136→    Args:
   137→        browser: BrowserManager instance
   138→        keywords: Keyword strings to search
   139→        company: Company filter strings
   140→        max_pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract per keyword
   141→        keep_last_tab_open: Keep the last enterprise tab open for inline messaging
   142→
   143→    Returns:
   144→        (deduplicated candidates list, set of seen IDs)
   145→    """
   146→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   147→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   148→
   149→    for idx, kw in enumerate(keywords):
   150→        console.print(f"\n[bold blue][{idx+1}/{len(keywords)}] Enterprise search: {kw}[/bold blue]")
   151→
   152→        is_last = idx == len(keywords) - 1
   153→        candidates = await search_candidates_enterprise(
   154→            keywords=kw,
   155→            company=company,
   156→            pages=max_pages,
   157→            browser=browser,
   158→            keep_tab_open=keep_last_tab_open and is_last,
   159→        )
   160→
   161→        new_count = 0
   162→        for c in candidates:
   163→            if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids:
   164→                seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
   165→                all_candidates.append(c)
   166→                new_count += 1
   167→
   168→        console.print(f"  Found {len(candidates)} candidates, {new_count} new (deduplicated)")
   169→
   170→    return all_candidates, seen_ids
   171→

   173→async def search_all_keywords_talent_bank(
   174→    browser: BrowserManager,

   176→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   177→    max_pages: int,
   178→    min_years: Optional[int] = None,
   179→) -> Tuple[List[CandidateBasic], Set[str]]:
   180→    """Iterate keywords via talent bank path, deduplicate, return combined results.
   181→
   182→    Talent bank navigates the current tab in-place (unlike enterprise which
   183→    opens a new tab), so no tab lifecycle management is needed.
   184→
   185→    Args:
   186→        browser: BrowserManager instance
   187→        keywords: Keyword strings to search
   188→        company: Company filter strings
   189→        max_pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract per keyword
   190→
   191→    Returns:
   192→        (deduplicated candidates list, set of seen IDs)
   193→    """
   194→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   195→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   196→
   197→    for idx, kw in enumerate(keywords):
   198→        console.print(
   199→            f"\n[bold blue][{idx+1}/{len(keywords)}] Talent bank search: {kw}[/bold blue]"
   200→        )
   201→
   202→        candidates = await search_candidates_talent_bank(
   203→            keywords=kw,
   204→            company=company,
   205→            pages=max_pages,
   206→            browser=browser,
   207→            min_years=min_years if idx == 0 else None,  # Set filter once on first keyword
   208→        )
   209→
   210→        new_count = 0
   211→        for c in candidates:
   212→            if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids:
   213→                seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
   214→                all_candidates.append(c)
   215→                new_count += 1
   216→
   217→        console.print(f"  Found {len(candidates)} candidates, {new_count} new (deduplicated)")
   218→
   219→    return all_candidates, seen_ids

   222→async def send_batch(
   223→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   224→    template: str,
   225→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   226→    search_keywords: List[str],
   227→    browser: BrowserManager,
   228→    skip_messaged: bool,
   229→    interactive: bool = False,
   230→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   231→    mode: "SearchMode" = None,
   232→    exchange_phone: bool = False,
   233→    exchange_wechat: bool = False,
   234→) -> dict:
   235→    """Send messages to a batch of candidates, sorted by score.
   236→
   237→    Dispatches to the appropriate message module function based on mode.
   238→
   239→    Args:
   240→        candidates: List of CandidateBasic objects
   241→        template: Template name
   242→        variables: Template variables
   243→        search_keywords: Original search keywords (for scoring)
   244→        browser: BrowserManager instance
   245→        skip_messaged: Whether to skip already-messaged candidates
   246→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery (Path A only)
   247→        skip_confirmation: Skip interactive confirmation prompt
   248→        mode: Search mode — determines which send path to use
   249→        exchange_phone: Click "交换电话" in IM tab (Path C only)
   250→        exchange_wechat: Click "交换微信" in IM tab (Path C only)
   251→
   252→    Returns:
   253→        Results dict with total/sent/failed/skipped/rate_limited counts
   254→    """
   255→    if mode is None:
   256→        mode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER
   257→
   258→    sorted_candidates = sort_candidates_by_score(candidates, search_keywords=search_keywords)
   259→    dicts = _candidates_to_dicts(sorted_candidates)
   260→
   261→    if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   262→        return await send_message_batch_enterprise(
   263→            page=browser.page,
   264→            candidates=dicts,
   265→            template_name=template,
   266→            common_variables=variables,
   267→            browser=browser,
   268→            skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   269→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   270→        )
   271→    elif mode == SearchMode.TALENT_BANK:
   272→        return await send_message_batch_talent_bank(
   273→            page=browser.page,
   274→            candidates=dicts,
   275→            template_name=template,
   276→            common_variables=variables,
   277→            browser=browser,
   278→            skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   279→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   280→            exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   281→            exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   282→        )
   283→    else:
   284→        return await send_message_batch(
   285→            candidates=dicts,
   286→            template_name=template,
   287→            common_variables=variables,
   288→            browser=browser,
   289→            skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   290→            interactive=interactive,
   291→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   292→        )
   293→

   295→def generate_pipeline_report(
   296→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   297→    results: dict,
   298→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   299→    template: str,
   300→    mode: SearchMode,
   301→) -> str:
   302→    """Generate an Excel report for a pipeline run.
   303→
   304→    Args:
   305→        candidates: All candidates from search
   306→        results: Send results dict (total/sent/failed/skipped/rate_limited/details)
   307→        keywords: Search keywords used
   308→        template: Template name used
   309→        mode: Search mode (search_center or enterprise)
   310→
   311→    Returns:
   312→        Path to the generated report file
   313→    """
   314→    from openpyxl import Workbook
   315→    from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
   316→    from loguru import logger
   317→
   318→    timestamp = datetime.now()
   319→    config = get_config()
   320→    report_dir = Path(config.get("data.report_dir", "data/reports"))
   321→    report_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   322→    report_path = report_dir / f"pipeline_{timestamp.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.xlsx"
   323→
   324→    wb = Workbook()
   325→
   326→    # --- Sheet 1: Overview ---
   327→    ws_overview = wb.active
   328→    ws_overview.title = "概览"
   329→
   330→    header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
   331→    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
   332→    border = Border(
   333→        left=Side(style="thin"),
   334→        right=Side(style="thin"),
   335→        top=Side(style="thin"),
   336→        bottom=Side(style="thin"),
   337→    )
   338→
   339→    overview_rows = [
   340→        ("执行时间", timestamp.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")),
   341→        ("搜索关键词", ", ".join(keywords)),
   342→        ("消息模板", template),
   343→        ("搜索模式", mode.value),
   344→        ("搜索结果数", results["total"]),
   345→        ("发送总数", results["sent"] + results["failed"]),
   346→        ("成功", results["sent"]),
   347→        ("失败", results["failed"]),
   348→        ("跳过(已沟通)", results["skipped"]),
   349→        ("限流", results["rate_limited"]),
   350→    ]
   351→
   352→    for r_idx, (key, value) in enumerate(overview_rows, 1):
   353→        cell_key = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=1, value=key)
   354→        cell_val = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=2, value=value)
   355→        cell_key.font = Font(bold=True)
   356→        for cell in (cell_key, cell_val):
   357→            cell.border = border
   358→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center")
   359→
   360→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["A"].width = 18
   361→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["B"].width = 40
   362→
   363→    # --- Sheet 2: Candidate Details ---
   364→    ws_details = wb.create_sheet(title="候选人详情")
   365→
   366→    columns = ["序号", "姓名", "职位", "公司", "地区", "脉脉ID", "沟通状态", "发送内容", "失败原因"]
   367→    for c_idx, col_name in enumerate(columns, 1):
   368→        cell = ws_details.cell(row=1, column=c_idx, value=col_name)
   369→        cell.font = header_font
   370→        cell.fill = header_fill
   371→        cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center")
   372→        cell.border = border
   373→
   374→    # Build a lookup from maimai_id -> detail
   375→    details_by_id: Dict[str, dict] = {}
   376→    for detail in results.get("details", []):
   377→        details_by_id[detail["maimai_id"]] = detail
   378→
   379→    status_map = {
   380→        "sent": "已发送",
   381→        "failed": "失败",
   382→        "skipped": "跳过",
   383→        "rate_limited": "限流",
   384→    }
   385→
   386→    for r_idx, c in enumerate(candidates, 1):
   387→        detail = details_by_id.get(c.maimai_id, {})
   388→        raw_status = detail.get("status", "not_attempted")
   389→        status_label = status_map.get(raw_status, "未处理")
   390→        reason = detail.get("reason", "")
   391→
   392→        content = detail.get("content", "")
   393→        row_data = [
   394→            r_idx,
   395→            c.name,
   396→            c.title,
   397→            c.company,
   398→            c.location or "",
   399→            c.maimai_id,
   400→            status_label,
   401→            content,
   402→            reason,
   403→        ]
   404→        for c_idx, value in enumerate(row_data, 1):
   405→            cell = ws_details.cell(row=r_idx + 1, column=c_idx, value=value)
   406→            cell.border = border
   407→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   408→
   409→    detail_widths = {"A": 6, "B": 12, "C": 25, "D": 20, "E": 12, "F": 18, "G": 12, "H": 40, "I": 30}
   410→    for col, width in detail_widths.items():
   411→        ws_details.column_dimensions[col].width = width
   412→
   413→    ws_details.freeze_panes = "A2"
   414→    ws_details.auto_filter.ref = ws_details.dimensions
   415→
   416→    wb.save(str(report_path))
   417→    logger.info(f"Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}")
   418→    console.print(f"[green]Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}[/green]")
   419→    return str(report_path)
   420→
   421→
   422→def save_run_history(
   423→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   424→    template: str,
   425→    mode: SearchMode,
   426→    results: dict,
   427→    dry_run: bool,
   428→    report_path: Optional[str] = None,
   429→) -> None:
   430→    """Append a pipeline run record to JSON and regenerate Markdown summary.
   431→
   432→    Produces two files under data/:
   433→    - run_history.json: machine-readable array of all runs
   434→    - run_history.md: human-readable Markdown table
   435→    """
   436→    import json
   437→    from loguru import logger
   438→
   439→    data_dir = Path("data")
   440→    data_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   441→    json_path = data_dir / "run_history.json"
   442→    md_path = data_dir / "run_history.md"
   443→
   444→    # Read existing records
   445→    records: List[dict] = []
   446→    if json_path.exists():
   447→        try:
   448→            records = json.loads(json_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   449→        except (json.JSONDecodeError, IOError):
   450→            logger.warning("Failed to read run_history.json, starting fresh")
   451→
   452→    # Build new record
   453→    timestamp = datetime.now()
   454→    record = {
   455→        "timestamp": timestamp.isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
   456→        "keywords": list(keywords),
   457→        "template": template,
   458→        "mode": mode.value if isinstance(mode, SearchMode) else mode,
   459→        "dry_run": dry_run,
   460→        "total": results.get("total", 0),
   461→        "sent": results.get("sent", 0),
   462→        "failed": results.get("failed", 0),
   463→        "skipped": results.get("skipped", 0),
   464→        "rate_limited": results.get("rate_limited", 0),
   465→        "report_file": Path(report_path).name if report_path else None,
   466→    }
   467→    records.append(record)
   468→
   469→    # Write JSON
   470→    json_path.write_text(json.dumps(records, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   471→
   472→    # Regenerate Markdown from full history
   473→    lines = [
   474→        "# Pipeline 运行历史",
   475→        "",
   476→        "| 时间 | 关键词 | 模板 | 模式 | 搜索数 | 发送 | 失败 | 跳过 | 限流 | 报告 |",
   477→        "|------|--------|------|------|--------|------|------|------|------|------|",
   478→    ]
   479→    for r in records:
   480→        ts = r["timestamp"][:16].replace("T", " ")
   481→        kws = ", ".join(r["keywords"])
   482→        tpl = r["template"]
   483→        m = r["mode"]
   484→        total = str(r["total"])
   485→        if r.get("dry_run"):
   486→            sent = failed = skipped = rate_limited = "-"
   487→        else:
   488→            sent = str(r["sent"])
   489→            failed = str(r["failed"])
   490→            skipped = str(r["skipped"])
   491→            rate_limited = str(r["rate_limited"])
   492→        report = r.get("report_file") or "-"
   493→        lines.append(
   494→            f"| {ts} | {kws} | {tpl} | {m} | {total} | {sent} | {failed} | {skipped} | {rate_limited} | {report} |"
   495→        )
   496→
   497→    md_path.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   498→    logger.info(f"Run history updated: {json_path}")
   499→    console.print(f"[dim]运行历史已更新: {md_path}[/dim]")
   500→
   501→
   502→def display_candidates_table(candidates: List[CandidateBasic], title: str) -> None:
   503→    """Display a Rich table of candidates."""
   504→    table = Table(title=f"{title} ({len(candidates)} candidates)")
   505→    table.add_column("#", style="dim", justify="right")
   506→    table.add_column("Name", style="cyan")
   507→    table.add_column("Title", style="green")
   508→    table.add_column("Company", style="yellow")
   509→    table.add_column("Location", style="blue")
   510→    has_scores = any(getattr(c, "score", None) is not None for c in candidates[:1])
   511→    if has_scores:
   512→        table.add_column("Score", style="magenta", justify="right")
   513→    table.add_column("ID", style="dim")
   514→
   515→    for i, c in enumerate(candidates[:50], 1):
   516→        row = [str(i), c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or ""]
   517→        if has_scores:
   518→            row.append(str(getattr(c, "score", "")))
   519→        row.append(c.maimai_id)
   520→        table.add_row(*row)
   521→
   522→    console.print(table)
   523→
   524→    if len(candidates) > 50:
   525→        console.print(f"[dim]... and {len(candidates) - 50} more[/dim]")
   526→
   527→
   528→def display_send_results(
   529→    results: dict, title: str = "Send Results", quota: Optional[dict] = None
   530→) -> None:
   531→    """Display send results summary table."""
   532→    console.print()
   533→    result_table = Table(title=title)
   534→    result_table.add_column("Metric", style="bold")
   535→    result_table.add_column("Count", justify="right")
   536→
   537→    result_table.add_row("Total candidates", str(results["total"]))
   538→    result_table.add_row("Sent", f"[green]{results['sent']}[/green]")
   539→    result_table.add_row("Failed", f"[red]{results['failed']}[/red]")
   540→    result_table.add_row("Skipped (already messaged)", f"[yellow]{results['skipped']}[/yellow]")
   541→    result_table.add_row("Rate limited", f"[yellow]{results['rate_limited']}[/yellow]")
   542→    if quota:
   543→        result_table.add_row("联系券剩余", f"[cyan]{quota.get('uh_left', '?')}[/cyan]")
   544→
   545→    console.print(result_table)

   547→
   548→async def run_pipeline_default(
   549→    browser: BrowserManager,
   550→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   551→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   552→    location: Optional[str],
   553→    max_pages: int,
   554→    template: str,
   555→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   556→    dry_run: bool,
   557→    skip_messaged: bool,
   558→    interactive: bool = False,
   559→    mode: SearchMode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER,
   560→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   561→    exchange_phone: bool = False,
   562→    exchange_wechat: bool = False,
   563→    min_years: Optional[int] = None,
   564→) -> None:
   565→    """Pipeline: search all pages first, then send messages.
   566→
   567→    Saves a checkpoint after search completes so that message sending
   568→    can be resumed if interrupted.
   569→    """
   570→    checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   571→
   572→    # Talent bank: search + send per keyword (page changes between keywords)
   573→    if mode == SearchMode.TALENT_BANK and not dry_run:
   574→        all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   575→        seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   576→        combined_results = {
   577→            "total": 0,
   578→            "sent": 0,
   579→            "failed": 0,
   580→            "skipped": 0,
   581→            "rate_limited": 0,
   582→            "details": [],
   583→        }
   584→
   585→        for idx, kw in enumerate(keywords):
   586→            console.print(f"\n[bold blue][{idx+1}/{len(keywords)}] Talent bank: {kw}[/bold blue]")
   587→            kw_candidates = await search_candidates_talent_bank(
   588→                keywords=kw,
   589→                company=company,
   590→                pages=max_pages,
   591→                browser=browser,
   592→                min_years=min_years if idx == 0 else None,
   593→            )
   594→            # Deduplicate
   595→            new_candidates = []
   596→            for c in kw_candidates:
   597→                if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids:
   598→                    seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
   599→                    new_candidates.append(c)
   600→            all_candidates.extend(new_candidates)
   601→            console.print(f"  Found {len(new_candidates)} new candidates (deduplicated)")
   602→
   603→            if not new_candidates:
   604→                continue
   605→
   606→            display_candidates_table(new_candidates, f"Keyword: {kw}")
   607→
   608→            # Send messages immediately while page shows these results
   609→            kw_results = await send_batch(
   610→                new_candidates,
   611→                template,
   612→                variables,
   613→                [kw],
   614→                browser,
   615→                skip_messaged,
   616→                skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   617→                mode=SearchMode.TALENT_BANK,
   618→                exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   619→                exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   620→            )
   621→            for key in ("total", "sent", "failed", "skipped", "rate_limited"):
   622→                combined_results[key] += kw_results.get(key, 0)
   623→            combined_results["details"].extend(kw_results.get("details", []))
   624→
   625→        if not all_candidates:
   626→            console.print("[yellow]No candidates found for any keyword.[/yellow]")
   627→            return
   628→
   629→        quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
   630→        display_send_results(combined_results, quota=quota)
   631→        report_path = generate_pipeline_report(
   632→            all_candidates, combined_results, keywords, template, mode
   633→        )
   634→        save_run_history(
   635→            keywords, template, mode, combined_results, dry_run=False, report_path=report_path
   636→        )
   637→        checkpoint.delete()
   638→        console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")
   639→        _auto_backup_database()
   640→        return
   641→
   642→    if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   643→        # Keep enterprise tab open for inline messaging (unless dry_run)
   644→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   645→            browser,
   646→            keywords,
   647→            company,
   648→            max_pages,
   649→            keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   650→        )
   651→    elif mode == SearchMode.TALENT_BANK:
   652→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords_talent_bank(
   653→            browser,
   654→            keywords,
   655→            company,
   656→            max_pages,
   657→            min_years=min_years,
   658→        )
   659→    else:
   660→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords(
   661→            browser,
   662→            keywords,
   663→            company,
   664→            location,
   665→            max_pages,
   666→        )
   667→
   668→    if not all_candidates:
   669→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates found for any keyword.[/yellow]")
   670→        return
   671→
   672→    # Save checkpoint after search (batch_pages=0 marks non-batch mode)
   673→    _save_checkpoint(
   674→        checkpoint,
   675→        keywords,
   676→        template,
   677→        variables,
   678→        company,
   679→        location,
   680→        max_pages,
   681→        0,
   682→        skip_messaged,
   683→        interactive,
   684→        max_pages,
   685→        [],
   686→        seen_ids,
   687→        {"total": 0, "sent": 0, "failed": 0, "skipped": 0, "rate_limited": 0},
   688→        mode=mode.value,
   689→        dry_run=dry_run,
   690→        exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   691→        exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   692→        min_years=min_years,
   693→    )
   694→
   695→    display_candidates_table(all_candidates, "Pipeline Results")
   696→
   697→    if dry_run:
   698→        console.print(
   699→            f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] {len(all_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]"
   700→        )
   701→        save_run_history(
   702→            keywords,
   703→            template,
   704→            mode,

   737→async def run_pipeline_batched(
   738→    browser: BrowserManager,
   739→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   740→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   741→    location: Optional[str],
   742→    max_pages: int,

   756→    """Batched pipeline: search N pages, send messages, repeat."""
   757→    # Restore state from checkpoint or start fresh
   758→    if resume_ckpt:
   759→        # On resume, only treat sent_ids as truly "seen" (skip-worthy).
   760→        # Candidates that were found but not sent should be retried.
   761→        sent_ids = list(resume_ckpt.sent_ids)
   762→        seen_ids = set(sent_ids)  # only skip candidates already successfully sent
   763→        total_results = resume_ckpt.total_results or {

   770→        start_from_page = resume_ckpt.completed_pages + 1
   771→        console.print(

   773→        )
   774→        checkpoint = resume_ckpt
   775→    else:
   776→        seen_ids = set()
   777→        sent_ids = []
   778→        total_results = {"total": 0, "sent": 0, "failed": 0, "skipped": 0, "rate_limited": 0}
   779→        start_from_page = 1
   780→        checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   781→
   782→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   783→    all_details: List[dict] = []
   784→    batch_num = 0
   785→    consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   786→
   787→    batch_start = start_from_page
   788→    while batch_start <= max_pages:
   789→        batch_page_count = min(batch_pages, max_pages - batch_start + 1)
   790→        batch_num += 1
   791→        batch_end = batch_start + batch_page_count - 1
   792→
   793→        console.print(
   794→            f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Batch {batch_num}: Pages {batch_start}-{batch_end} ━━━[/bold magenta]"
   795→        )
   796→
   797→        if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   798→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   799→                browser,
   800→                keywords,
   801→                company,
   802→                batch_page_count,
   803→                keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   804→            )
   805→        elif mode == SearchMode.TALENT_BANK:
   806→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_talent_bank(
   807→                browser,
   808→                keywords,

   812→            )
   813→        else:
   814→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords(
   815→                browser,
   816→                keywords,
   817→                company,
   818→                location,
   819→                batch_page_count,
   820→                start_page=batch_start,
   821→            )
   822→        # Filter out globally seen IDs
   823→        batch_candidates = [c for c in batch_candidates if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids]
   824→        seen_ids.update(c.maimai_id for c in batch_candidates)
   825→        all_candidates.extend(batch_candidates)
   826→
   827→        if not batch_candidates:
   828→            consecutive_empty_batches += 1
   829→            console.print(f"[yellow]No new candidates in batch {batch_num}.[/yellow]")
   830→
   831→            if consecutive_empty_batches >= 2:
   832→                console.print(

   834→                )
   835→                if not await check_login_status(browser.page):

   838→                    )
   839→                    session_manager = get_session_manager()
   840→                    await session_manager.clear()
   841→                    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   842→                    consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   843→                    console.print("[green]Re-authenticated. Retrying current batch...[/green]")
   844→                    batch_num -= 1
   845→                    continue
   846→                else:
   847→                    console.print(
   848→                        "[yellow]Session appears valid. Possibly no more results for these keywords.[/yellow]"
   849→                    )
   850→
   851→            _save_checkpoint(
   852→                checkpoint,
   853→                keywords,
   854→                template,
   855→                variables,
   856→                company,
   857→                location,
   858→                max_pages,
   859→                batch_pages,
   860→                skip_messaged,
   861→                interactive,
   862→                batch_end,
   863→                sent_ids,
   864→                seen_ids,
   865→                total_results,
   866→                mode=mode.value,
   867→                dry_run=dry_run,
   868→                exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   869→                exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   870→                min_years=min_years,
   871→            )
   872→            batch_start += batch_pages
   873→            continue
   874→        else:
   875→            consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   876→
   877→        display_candidates_table(batch_candidates, f"Batch {batch_num} Results")
   878→
   879→        if dry_run:
   880→            console.print(
   881→                f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] Batch {batch_num}: {len(batch_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]"
   882→            )
   883→            _save_checkpoint(
   884→                checkpoint,
   885→                keywords,
   886→                template,
   887→                variables,
   888→                company,
   889→                location,
   890→                max_pages,
   891→                batch_pages,
   892→                skip_messaged,
   893→                interactive,
   894→                batch_end,
   895→                sent_ids,
   896→                seen_ids,
   897→                total_results,
   898→                mode=mode.value,
   899→                dry_run=dry_run,
   900→                exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   901→                exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   902→                min_years=min_years,
   903→            )
   904→            batch_start += batch_pages
   905→            continue
   906→
   907→        results = await send_batch(
   908→            batch_candidates,
   909→            template,
   910→            variables,
   911→            list(keywords),
   912→            browser,
   913→            skip_messaged,
   914→            interactive,
   915→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   916→            mode=mode,
   917→            exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   918→            exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   919→        )
   920→        batch_quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
   921→        display_send_results(results, title=f"Batch {batch_num} Send Results", quota=batch_quota)
   922→
   923→        all_details.extend(results.get("details", []))
   924→        for detail in results.get("details", []):
   925→            if detail.get("status") == "sent":
   926→                sent_ids.append(detail["maimai_id"])
   927→
   928→        for key in total_results:
   929→            total_results[key] += results[key]
   930→
   931→        _save_checkpoint(
   932→            checkpoint,
   933→            keywords,
   934→            template,
   935→            variables,
   936→            company,
   937→            location,
   938→            max_pages,
   939→            batch_pages,
   940→            skip_messaged,
   941→            interactive,

   947→            dry_run=dry_run,

   949→            exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   950→            min_years=min_years,

   952→        console.print(f"[dim]Checkpoint saved (page {batch_end})[/dim]")
   953→
   954→        batch_start += batch_pages
   955→
   956→    # Final summary
   957→    console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Pipeline Complete ━━━[/bold magenta]")
   958→    console.print(f"Total unique candidates found: {len(seen_ids)}")
   959→    report_path = None
   960→    if not dry_run and total_results["total"] > 0:
   961→        final_quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
   962→        display_send_results(total_results, title="Overall Send Results", quota=final_quota)
   963→        total_results_with_details = {**total_results, "details": all_details}
   964→        report_path = generate_pipeline_report(
